reviews.review_description: Fun I really recommend the game but one problem is why is there a ranked mode but you only play bots hello how does that make sense like this game is fun but why am I playing bots I win every single time so what’s the point is that you been playing? ￼
I'm a little confused. I play to rank up my character. Are these players bots? Because I win everytime. How do I play at other tables? I only meet 1 player.

I fell in love with this game when I first started playing it. The concept is simple but extremely addictive, and overall, I really enjoy it.
However, lately the gameplay has become almost impossible because of ongoing glitches. Sometimes the game lets me into the room, and sometimes it does not. Other times, when I appear in the room, half of my body is stuck in the floor even though I have set the floor height correctly.
When I appear in the lounge area, I often cannot see anyone else. I also cannot tell whether my microphone is on or off, which makes it even harder to interact with other players. Other times, I make it to my table, but I cannot access my tools. It only says “your table” and leaves me stuck there.
Once I actually get into gameplay, I usually do not have many problems. The main issue seems to be the lounge area and getting properly loaded into the game. These glitches seem to have gotten worse over the last six months or so.
I have tried exiting and re-entering the game, but I am not sure how else to fix it. I have spent money on this game, so I really need this issue to be addressed. I still love the game, but the glitches are making it very frustrating to play.
This game is so much better than it has any right to be. Cannot stop playing. I just wish you could store more chests because you're forced to take breaks so you don't lose chests.

This game battle orb afigured out why they glitches out on the load sequence. They both just started acting up, I've been trying to load them for 15 minutes. Started a couple days ago. Any ideas? & yes I've tried reinstalling them.
Very fun marble battle game

This game just launched a couple of hours ago and I've been playing it non stop.  The 4 player matches are so fun, you get to hang out with people while also battling them. The Heroes also look great and there's some deep strategy going on with which of them to use in your team. ++ totally recommend it

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Battle Orb! 😊

reviews.review_description: It's a very frustrating game. The selection of players to fight is completely unfair. I have an average level of 20  and for four days it makes me fight only with players who have all characters at level 25. It's almost impossible for me to have even a chance at victory. 🤬😡🤬😡🤬😡

developer_response.body:
Sorry to hear that your recent experience has been an unpleasant one! 😔 

We built the matchmaking system to always try to match players of similar skill level. Given that your recent opponents have mostly had stronger heroes than you, that means that the system has calculated your skill at a very high level, likely due to your previous winning streak.

As you play more matches and give the system more data to work with, your matches will slowly become more balanced and the overall experience should feel a lot more fair.

We're really grateful for your feedback and support and we're always here if there's anything we can help with! 💖

reviews.review_description: I love it
This game is so cool. I love playing this!!!

Thought it looked fun, but then discovered they use the same level-up system as clash royale - a scummy pay-to-win system where you have to wait high amounts of time to unlock a single chest, and can only hold a maximum of 4 (But only unlock ONE at a time). After that, you can't hold or gain more, or even replace them if you get a better chest.

Massive red flag, a good game ruined by a horrible level up system.

Absolutely disgusted.

developer_response.body:
We're sorry to hear that your experience has not been great so far! 😞 We do our best to maintain the reward system fair for everyone, no matter if they decide to buy gems or not.

We designed our system so that the only thing you can buy with real money is time. Everything else, including your ability to win any match you play, is strictly tied to pure skill and strategy.

We are also looking into more ways of opening chests and redeeming multiple rewards at a time, but it will take us some time to implement some cool solutions for this.

We'd love it if you gave Battle Orb a second chance and kept the feedback coming through our Discord server: https://discord.gg/dbYdcY3Eg3

reviews.review_description: This game is enjoyable!  Super fun. Also very cute. Play at least a round or two a day.  I do however feel since reaching level ten with some orbs I have been put in with 11 and 12 level orbs with not much chance of winning. (Could just be I need to find a better strategy with my orbs🤭).  I highly recommend this game . Nice job developers!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Battle Orb! 😊

We're constantly working on keeping the game as balanced as possible, so, if you'd like to send us any more feedback, feel free to join our Discord!

https://discord.gg/dbYdcY3Eg3

reviews.review_description: Game will be a lot better it's a developer stop putting  Bots this game is nothing but Bots but it would be a great game if real people played but for real stop the stupidness and together with real people we can make battle orbs great again

developer_response.body: Thank you for your honest feedback! To explain the current situation, we use bots in order to make sure that the waiting time before each match is not too long for any of our players. However, as the community grows and more players start showing up, we do plan on gradually reducing bot numbers and maybe one day even getting rid of them fully.

reviews.review_description: I only played a couple games but god is it fun. This is where vr thrives, ez pick up & play games that are FUN 😁 im tired of every vr game designer trying to make huge games. We need to go back to simple arcade design. Vr isn't cut out for walking around huge worlds

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Battle Orb! 😊

reviews.review_description: Just got the game and it’s absolutely amazing! I got new units from a chest and I’m eager to play with them and earn more chests and rank up to unlock some new ones too. Love the music and the gameplay!! Those bouncing sounds are funny too!! Also, the abilities of the units are cool as well! I got a triple elimination with Steamy and felt invincible!

reviews.review_description: I just started playing this game.  My husband and I both downloaded the game.  It is so much fun.   You can level up your fighters.  As you play and win, you gain rank.  Inlove that you can play against family and friends or strangers.  I highly recommend this game.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We are glad that you are enjoying Battle Orb! 💖

reviews.review_description: Finally a free game on quest that is worth the time. It has a strategic element and also rewards skill, but you can pick up and play in no time since that games are ranked and you match with players of similar skill level. Can't wait to unlock more heroes.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Battle Orb! 😊

reviews.review_description:
Game seems fun and well put together. I just struggle with knowing which character is mine with red green color blindness.. if the shade of one was just a little darker it would probably do the trick. I couldn’t find any options and hopefully it’s something that could be changed in the future. Thanks. 
Edit: The devs fixed the issue very quickly. The color isn’t a problem anymore. I appreciate it!

developer_response.body: We're glad we could help make the game more accessible! Let us know if you find anything else we can do to improve things! ❤️

reviews.review_title: What a solid idea for a game!
reviews.review_description: Battle Orb is like mixed reality pool, but every ball has a special effect! I think it’s great that each game you go into can be different based on what orbs the player has on their team. It’s also cool how you get chest after playing. It’s a nice reward/incentive to continue playing.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Battle Orb! 😊

reviews.review_description: This game is simple but fun, and I'm addicted to it. But in a good way. And I saw somebody say that it's paid to win. That is not true. There is no option to pay to win. All you have to do is play and unlock chests. And don't forget to level up your characters..... OK, so there is an option to buy in-game currency to open chests early.  It didn't pop up for me until after I had posted my review.  But this game is still so much fun... Yes I paid to open a chests 😅

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad that you're enjoying Battle Orb! 😊

reviews.review_description: What a gem this game is! Having loads of fun with it so far. Imagine slingshotting armored knights, archers, and spellcasters across your living room like pool balls in a 3D battlefield. The characters look super unique and quirky I love it

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Battle Orb! 😊

reviews.review_description: I love it especially since I got the mic issues fixed so I can toggle it on and off. I am looking forward to the lobby and what it will hold.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your kind words. 
If you go to the app settings by pressing the three dots button on the top right of the game icon in your app library screen, you should be able to enable your mic from there and when you return to the game it should work again.

reviews.review_description:
This game is addicting but I wish there was a way to throw away the common chests and collect the more epic ones. I’m doing decent in game just wish I could open more than one chest at a time.

Be careful with match making. They pair you up with toxic players that are 3 levels higher than your lowest one and you get bullied out of the game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your honest feedback! We are currently working on new ways of unlocking chests and we plan on releasing an update soon.

As for toxicity, if you ever encounter any toxic players, we strongly recommend using the report feature.

reviews.review_description: It's like a 3d billiard game in my room! The cute heroes bounce around like crazy and have cool effects, and there are lots of them! Fun to play with a lot of depth and strategy.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Battle Orb! 😊

reviews.review_description: I’ve been playing this game for a couple hours now. While it is in early access, and I haven’t found very many human players yet, the game premise is a lot of fun and I hope the game grows a lot.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words! We're glad you're enjoying Battle Orb! 😊

reviews.review_description:
Basically 4D pool with hit point stats. Fun, cute…until session management monetization of pay to win rears its head. 

It’s not the worst case of it but putting a 15 minute timer to unlock rewards (like mobile games) knowing most batteries will/may deplete by the time it finishes and you lose what you were going to get. 

But it is a fun game!

Devs- thanks for the fast response and explanation. Look forward to futures updates!

developer_response.body: Thank you for giving us a chance! We'll do our best to keep the game fair and fun for everyone!

reviews.review_description: Everyone needs to get this game and it's free!! I have lost hours over the weekend hooked on this. I am so excited to see how the game evolves in the future ❤️

reviews.review_description: After fixing a bug, the game is great. It needs better instructions. I need to imbue a character, but there is no information on what that is or how to do it.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback! To clear things up a bit, imbuing is a mechanic through which one character applies an effect on another. We recommend checking out characters such as the Fairy, the Armorer, the Serpentine, the Hexer and the Marut to see a few examples of how imbuing can work.
